# PathWise

> PathWise matches students with tutors and personalized learning roadmaps via a 3-minute level quiz.

PathWise helps learners find the right tutor, build a step-by-step roadmap, and track progress through gamified milestones. Tutors create verified profiles, publish courses, and accept bookings.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What PathWise is and how to start.
- [Level Check Quiz](/quiz): 3-minute diagnostic that reveals your level.
- [Find a Tutor](/find-tutor): Match with verified tutors.
- [Live Demo](/demo): Try the platform with sample data, no signup.

## Optional

- [Matches](/matches): Your matched tutors after the quiz.
- [Roadmap](/roadmap): Personalized learning roadmap.
